description: Prove that conjunction is commutative: if a ∧ b holds, then b ∧ a holds.
statement: theorem And_swap (a b : Prop) : a ∧ b → b ∧ a
notes: Oracle lemmas from LeanCopilot select_premises (k=10): and_comm, and_assoc, and_left_comm, imp_and, forall_and, and_congr_left_iff, and_congr_right_iff, and_right_comm, And.comm, and_and_and_comm.
